item.title: Hello World
item.description:
This is my first blog post. Here’s how to use the Spotify shortcode:

{{< spotify id=“track_id_here” >}}

And here’s how to use the featured image shortcode:

{{< featured-image src="/images/hello-world.jpg" alt=“Hello World” caption=“My first blog post” >}}

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hello! I’m passionate about farming, technology, music, and Irish history. By day, I work on innovative agricultural projects, and by night, I explore the intersections of technology and traditional music.

This blog is my way of sharing these diverse interests with you. Join me as we explore sustainable farming practices, the latest tech trends, the rich tapestry of Irish culture, and the universal language of music.

My Interests

Farming & Agriculture

  • Sustainable farming practices
  • Innovation in agriculture
  • Local food systems

Technology

  • Web development
  • Smart home automation
  • Open source projects

Music

  • Traditional Irish music
  • Modern interpretations of Celtic music
  • Concert reviews and experiences

Irish History

  • Local history of Meath
  • The Boyne Valley heritage
  • Stone age monuments
